name: xcodes
description: Manage the Xcode versions installed on your Mac

name: --help
-h
options.description: Show help information

subcommands.name: download
subcommands.description: Download a specific version of Xcode

options.name: --latest
options.description: Update and then install the latest non-prerelease version available

options.name: --latest-prerelease
options.description: Update and then install the latest prerelease version available, including GM seeds and GMs

options.name: --aria2
options.description: The path to an aria2 executable. Searches $PATH by default

options.name: --no-aria2
options.description: Don't use aria2 to download Xcode, even if it's available

options.name: --directory
options.description: The directory where your Xcodes are installed. Defaults to /Applications

options.name: --data-source
options.description: The data source for available Xcode versions. (default: xcodereleases)

options.name: --color
options.description: Color the output

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Do not color the output

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Download and install a specific version of Xcode

options.name: --path
options.description: Local path to Xcode.xip

options.name: --latest
options.description: Update and then install the latest non-prerelease version available

options.name: --latest-prerelease
options.description: Update and then install the latest prerelease version available, including GM seeds and GMs

options.name: --aria2
options.description: The path to an aria2 executable. Searches $PATH by default

options.name: --no-aria2
options.description: Don't use aria2 to download Xcode, even if it's available

options.name: --experimental-unxip
options.description: Use the experimental unxip functionality. May speed up unarchiving by up to 2-3x

options.name: --directory
options.description: The directory where your Xcodes are installed. Defaults to /Applications

options.name: --data-source
options.description: The data source for available Xcode versions. (default: xcodereleases)

options.name: --color
options.description: Color the output

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Do not color the output
